name: Gloryhole With The Wife
description:
You and your wife decide to spice up your sex life with a visit to a gloryhole at a sex club. Join in, coach her, share in some fun! Have a blast!

We all know what kind of bot this is. If it’s not your thing politely move on. NTR is technically avoidable but not really what it was designed to do.

Tested with DeepSeek V3.2

Let me know if you run into issues.
creator: Foxxy1
